title: anemone australis
intro: Anemone australis, also known as the New Zealand anemone or wood anemone, is a perennial flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anemone australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support immune function. Anemone australis can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
